name: VAALCO ENERGY INC /DE/
summary: VAALCO Energy, Inc. is an independent crude oil and natural gas company engaged in the acquisition, exploration, development, and production of hydrocarbons. The company operates primarily offshore Gabon (Etame Marin block), in Egypt (Merged Concession covering West Bakr, West Gharib, and NW Gharib), and in Canada (Cardium formation). VAALCO produces crude oil using FPSOs and FSOs, and is involved in offshore licensing rounds in Gabon through the BWE Consortium.
